name: Laidback Luke
description:
Legendary Laidback Luke will perform at VULKAN ARENA , OSLO, on October 16th. 


Laidback Luke is a globally renowned DJ, producer and electronic music pioneer with a career spanning over two decades. Known for his exceptional technical skills, high-energy performances and genre-blending sound, he has headlined some of the world's biggest festivals and clubs, including Tomorrowland, Ultra Music Festival and EDC.

With countless hit records, iconic collaborations and an unmatched ability to connect with crowds, Laidback Luke continues to deliver unforgettable sets filled with house classics, festival anthems and cutting-edge dance music. Expect an electrifying performance from one of the most respected names in global electronic music.
